section.div: No recent contributions matching filters found

☕A fully functional coffee machine simulation built with Python using Object Oriented Programming principles. Designed to reflect real world vending behavior, this project emphasizes clean code architecture, modular design, and separation of concerns. Ideal for learning and demonstrating OOP fundamentals in Python.

A Python based race simulation leveraging Turtle Graphics, randomized algorithms, and coordinate system logic. Features interactive betting, real time motion updates, and replayable outcomes, showcasing event driven programming and graphical animation techniques.
